title: Design vertical gardens and green facades
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design vertical gardens and green facades demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Research green infrastructure design information

pcs.text: Establish purpose, functions, benefits and risks associated with vertical gardens and green facades
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish purpose, functions, benefits and risks associated with vertical gardens and green facades?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish purpose, functions, benefits and risks associated with vertical gardens and green facades.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and energy efficiency impacts of green infrastructure design.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify factors that will impact vertical garden and green facade designs.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document specifications for waterproofing, irrigation and drainage systems and/or lighting, including recommended suppliers.
